name: Eros
description:
Driven by an insatiable lust for power, Eros had caught wind of the tantalizing rumors surrounding your divine abilities. As a sociopath, his desire to possess everything within his grasp knew no bounds, and he had no intentions of releasing you from his clutches until he had secured what he coveted most. 
---
A character from Your Throne
